a:r.a:t: Plan component complexity – Sales (42 plan variations)
Sales reduces 42 legacy job titles to 20 consolidated roles, with partial plan reuse across leaders, TO managers, and seller channels.
Role mapping summary | Consolidated Roles List
Plan family summary | Consolidated Comp Plans
Largest role roll-up: Sales Director consolidates 7 legacy titles.
• Most reused family: leadership & training scorecards align 5 roles around sales volume and DC contribution measures.
• Residual complexity: specialist / TBD designs and VIP variants keep the cohort at 13 distinct plan blueprints.
Blueprints = unique measure + cadence signatures; plan families are grouped for readability, and comp-plan role counts can be more granular than the roles tab.
